Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Right To Possession
Off Calendar Mar-30-2009 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. CHARLES RAMSEY, TEL. NO. (510) 986-0455 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
TYRONE TAYLOR, TEL. NO. 574-5692, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER WITH TAINOINO FIAME ASSISTING DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANT TYRONE TAYLOR'S Notice of Hearing On Claim Of Right To Possession IS DENIED. JUDGMENT HAS ALREADY BEEN ENTERED IN THIS CASE AND DEFENDANT CAN NO LONGER FILE A CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR # 5759 =(301/PHA)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-03-2009 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. CHARLES T. RAMSEY, TEL. NO. (510) 986-0455 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - ATTY. RAMSEY INFORMED THE COURT THAT THE OTHER PARTY WILL BE COMING LATE THIS MORNING. THE COURT CALLED THE MATTER TWICE AND ON THE SECOND CALL AROUND 10:55 A.M. THERE IS STILL NO APPEARANCE FOR THE DEFENDANT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT ASTRID TAYLOR'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 5 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO ATTACH LEASE. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR# 8189 =301/PJB
